# Increase Credit Utilization via Whatsapp Drips

: Tushar Luthra
Created time: June 3, 2024 1:10 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: June 3, 2024 1:31 PM
Tasks: Cambridge wealth custom commercials (with Attributes) (https://app.notion.com/p/Cambridge-wealth-custom-commercials-with-Attributes-744f6d9e5a7740a782db49a55eba8f6c?pvs=21)

# **What problem are we solving?**

- Increase the utilization of allocated credit lines among users.
- Boost AUM/principal outstanding without aggressive promotion or breaching partnership agreements.
- Enhance user engagement and retention through personalized communication.

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Increase in credit line utilization among targeted users.
- Growth in AUM/principal outstanding as a direct result of the campaign.
- Engagement rate with the WhatsApp messages (e.g., open rate, response rate).
- Reduction in churn rate among users who received the WhatsApp nudges.
- Feedback from users regarding the WhatsApp communication.

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements

1. Whatsapp Drips message to be sent to customers
2. The message should be highly personalised & should include
    1. First name
    2. Available credit limit (As of date of message)
3. Whatsapp message **should NOT be sent** to users who came via IFA B2B partners, because our agreement with them, we are not alllowed to send their users a whatsapp message or any comms.

Following Partners/Platform we can’t send message to

****(List to be provided by Kapil)
4. Message should be automatically send twice in a month
    1. Mid of Month (12th-13th)
    2. End of Month (27th- 28th)
5. But we can keep other B2B platforms like Sankash, PhonePe & BharatNXT where there is no such agreement to not send a whatsapp.
6. Remove all those cases whose status is 'closed', 'pending disbursal approval', 'Blocked' etc, only fully disbursed cases should be there,
7. Delete cases where available credit limit is <10,000, Because I dont want to send users a message for utilisation where their current available credit limit is less than 10K.
8. Delete cases where limit utilisation is > 70%, because I dont want to bother this set of user who is already at high utilisation, objective is to nudge those users who have not utilised the limit much.
9. Set up tracking mechanism to understand success of this new whatsapp nudge launch.
